purpose: First builder-aware business entity module and template for future Module Builder generation.
singular_resource_lookup: warehouse is not expected to resolve; use warehouses
builder_requirements_learned: Register backend Resource in provider protected array $resources.
Call registerResources() during module provider registration.
Import module app.js into resources/js/app.js or implement a dynamic module entry registry.
Generate SmartDocs and RAG manifest with each module change.
Map database column type, model cast/default, Resource field class, validation, and UI control as one atomic field definition.
Resource capability contracts must be generated with their prerequisites, not added as isolated interface names.
Importable resources require import_id tracking support on the model/table for safe revert behavior.
AcceptsCustomFields makes the resource eligible for the Custom Field builder workflow.
validation: /warehouses loads ResourceTable instead of smoke text
Creating a warehouse must not send arbitrary text for is_active; Resource field must be Boolean.
Warehouse Resource implements Exportable and Importable.
Warehouse Resource implements AcceptsCustomFields and AcceptsUniqueCustomFields.
warehouses table has nullable indexed import_id after migration.
GET /api/warehouses/export-fields should no longer 404 because Resource is Exportable.
GET /api/warehouses/import/sample should no longer 404 because Resource is Importable.

import_id.purpose: Tracks rows created by Core import flow so imports can be inspected and reverted.

last_fix: 2026-06-19 warehouse Resource capability contracts enabled: custom fields, import, export, and import_id tracking.
